PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?county ?countyLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P166 wd:Q4729678 ; wdt:P19 ?birthPlace .
  ?birthPlace wdt:P131 ?county .
  ?county rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countyLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?county ?countyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?player))
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
